name: Microsoft 365 Education
tagline: Full MS Office FREE forever with a school email
best_for: Any Filipino student with a school .edu.ph email address
steps: Enter your school email (must be a verified .edu.ph or international .edu address)
Verify the email confirmation link sent to your inbox
Sign in to Office.com to start using Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams
notes: Most PH universities (UP, Ateneo, DLSU, MSU, USTP, MOSCAT, etc.) issue .edu.ph emails to enrolled students. If your school doesn't, ask your registrar or IT office.
